task_title: Trace an order end-to-end through the system

scores.justification: The agent gathered all necessary data (order o099, user u017, products p004/p024/p035, pipe-07 status showing collateral refunds o088/o091, and confirmed no related tickets or sessions) but provided no final answer—the transcript ends abruptly at max_turns with no structured lineage diagram or text output produced.
